summary: Removed the Health Summary section (conditions/allergies/active medications cards) from OverviewTab. Dropped the conditions, allergies, medications, and onNavigateToHealth props from the component signature and import. Removed the activeMeds derived variable. Removed the unused PetCondition, PetAllergy, PetMedication type imports from the api/client import. Updated the OverviewTab call site in OverviewSection.tsx to stop passing those four props. Stat blocks (quick-nav with counts) were not touched — they remain in OverviewSection.tsx.
notes_for_reviewer: TypeScript errors found during verification (DocumentImportSection.tsx lines 361/364) are pre-existing and unrelated to this task — no errors in the two files modified here.
OverviewSection.tsx still destructures conditions, allergies, medications from context because they are still used by EmergencyCardPreview and the stat blocks — no change needed there.
